chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.259 of 2017 [Syed Farukh Mazhar v. SGS Headquarters and others] ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For hg of main case 2.For hg of CMA No.1692/17 12.03.2025. Mirza Moiz Baig, advocate for appellant. Mr. Sajid Zahid, advocate for respondents. --------- MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Learned counsel for appellant, at very outset, has taken us to an order dated 27.09.2022, whereby the previous Bench, seized with the matter, had suggested to refer the matter back to learned single Judge/trial Court for deciding the suit pending between the parties expeditiously without being influenced by any observation on merits of the case. Learned counsel has suggested that if the appeal is disposed of in the above terms, he would be satisfied. 2. Learned counsel for respondents submits that he will have no objection if directions are issued to learned single Judge/trial Court to decide the suit expeditiously, as the evidence has almost been completed/recorded. 3. In above terms, this appeal is disposed of. The learned single Judge/trial Court should decide the matter on merits expeditiously within a period of three months, however, without being influenced by any observation recorded in the impugned order, on final merits of the case. The appeal is accordingly disposed of in above terms along with pending application. JUDGE HANIF JUDGE
